<|24.18|> We begin in prayer.<|25.40|>

<|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> And that conviction to act can begin by honoring our baptismal covenant to strive for justice and peace among all people and respect the dignity of every, every human being.<|18.48|><|endoftext|>
